name: Sauerbraten W/Sweet & Sour Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine water and vinegar in a stainless steel stockpot.
2. Add all marinate ingredients to the pot with the water and vinegar.
3. Place beef in the pot, ensuring it is fully covered by the marinade. Refrigerate for 3 to 4 days, turning once a day.
4. Remove meat from the marinade and place in a roasting pan with bacon drippings. Sear well on all sides.
5. In a thick-bottomed pot, combine remaining marinade ingredients (wine, beef stock, tomato puree, brown sugar) and bring to a boil. Add seared meat and simmer for 3 hours covered.
6. Reserve the meat in a warm place until ready to carve. Strain the gravy into a saucepan, reduce to about 3 1/2 cups, add cornstarch, and continuously stir while bringing to a boil.
7. Adjust seasoning as needed and serve gravy with carved meat.
